text:
If you thought Spring AI was powerful on its own, things get even more interesting when you combine it with 𝗠𝗖𝗣 (Model Context Protocol).

https://t.co/DHZxdSAzqi

urls.title: #springai #mcp #aiarchitecture #java #artificialintelligence #backenddevelopment | Vikram Kerure
urls.description: If you thought Spring AI was powerful on its own, things get even more interesting when you combine it with 𝗠𝗖𝗣 (Model Context Protocol). Because the real problem in AI today is not generating text. It’s giving models the 𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘹𝘵 at the right time. That’s where this combination stands out. --- 🚀 𝟭. 𝗘𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗨𝘀𝗲 (𝗦𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗔𝗜 + 𝗠𝗖𝗣 𝘁𝗼𝗴𝗲𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿) With Spring Framework, developers are already used to structured applications. Spring AI brings AI into that structure. MCP adds a clean way to connect 𝗲𝘅𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝘁𝗼𝗼𝗹𝘀, 𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗮, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁.  • Define tools once, reuse everywhere  • Plug external systems into AI flows easily  • Keep everything inside a familiar Spring setup No hacks. No messy glue code. --- ⭐ 𝟮. 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗔𝗱𝘃𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗲𝘀  • 𝗗𝘆𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗰 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁 𝗜𝗻𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 → Models don’t rely on static prompts anymore  • 𝗧𝗼𝗼𝗹 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗲 𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗻 → APIs, DBs, services become “AI tools”  • 𝗦𝗲?
